commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5bfc62ca927ee32dd01aad3c39ca4df40af193f9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a per-agent SQLite database scaffold, generated schema/types, registry guardrails, and a scoped SQLite-backed agent runtime cache store.

PR surface: Source +678, Tests +477, Generated +66, Other +8. Total +1229 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows an explicit path is accepted before any equality check against the canonical global state DB path. I did not run a write repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR has a protected maintainer label, a maintainer storage-direction decision, and one line-level guard fix needed before merge.

target.title: Add per-agent SQLite cache store
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a per-agent SQLite database scaffold at `agents/<agentId>/agent/openclaw-agent.sqlite`, registered from the global `agent_databases` index.
- Add a scoped SQLite-backed agent runtime cache store with JSON/blob values, expiry handling, and clear/delete/list helpers.
- Extend schema/Kysely generation and guardrails for the new agent database lifecycle.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/state/openclaw-agent-db.test.ts src/agents/cache/agent-cache-store.sqlite.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `pnpm db:kysely:check`
- `pnpm lint:kysely`
- `git diff --check`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-skills/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- `env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX mise exec node@24.16.0 -- pnpm check:changed`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Adds the next per-agent SQLite storage slice: database lifecycle, schema metadata, global registration, and a scoped per-agent cache table for rebuildable runtime state.

Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout with Node 24.16.0 for the changed gate; focused Vitest/unit checks against real Node SQLite; delegated Blacksmith Testbox attempted separately.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: The commands listed in Verification were run after the final commit. The Node 24 changed gate used repo `pnpm` directly because `corepack pnpm` selected pnpm 11.3.0 and failed the repo package-manager version preflight before checks.

Evidence after fix: Focused tests pass 14 assertions across the new agent DB and cache store. Local Node 24 `pnpm check:changed` completed core/core-test typecheck, core/scripts lint, import-cycle, runtime-sidecar, and guard checks successfully. Autoreview initially found explicit-path ownership/test-isolation bugs; both were fixed with regression tests and the final autoreview run was clean.

Observed result after fix: Per-agent DBs are created under the same state root as the global DB, including Vitest worker isolation; explicit DB paths cannot be shared across agent ids; explicit paths pointing at the global state DB are rejected before agent schema application; scoped cache rows preserve JSON/blob values and hide/clear expired entries.

What was not tested: No production caller was switched to this cache store yet, and no live agent workflow depends on it in this PR. Delegated Testbox `pnpm check:changed` on `tbx_01kswkj9rce9m2gr1f334za01k` failed in unrelated `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/model.ts` type errors outside this diff; a local Node 24 changed gate passed on the exact branch.
target.author: steipete
